---
title: "Qianhui Hong"
image: "files/profile.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:q2hong@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/qianhui-hong-27161923a/
---

**Welcome to my website!**

I am a graduate student studying Business Analytics.

I have experience in data analysis, SQL, and Python, and I enjoy using data to solve real-world business problems. Feel free to explore my projects and resume to learn more about my work！
